items.name: Ampersand Freight Systems
items.why: Fresh capital means growth targets and commercial chaos to fix; budget exists.

evidence.quote: Ampersand Freight Systems raised a $5M seed round to expand its B2B logistics platform across Southeast Asia. (fictional)

items.suggestedNextStep: Research: verify the entity, find the named decision-maker (never invent details), then decide the route.
